mapper.sql: id, template_code, template_name, template_type, industry_code, audit_year, file_path, description, status, create_by, create_time, update_time, is_deleted
mapper.select: SELECT FROM tpl_template WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tpl_template ( template_code, template_name, template_type, industry_code, audit_year, file_path, description, status, create_by, create_time, update_time, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{templateCode}, #{templateName}, #{templateType}, #{industryCode}, #{auditYear}, #{filePath}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createBy}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update:
UPDATE tpl_template
update_time = NOW(), template_name = #{templateName}, template_type = #{templateType}, industry_code = #{industryCode}, audit_year = #{auditYear}, file_path = #{filePath}, description = #{description}, status = #{status},
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE tpl_template SET is_deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
